data.content_ref: inline:{"pairwise": {"decisive_point": "Egypt survived because its military organization (archer-based, riverine, temple-subsidized) was less chariot-aristocracy dependent and could absorb iron transition gradually", "loser": "8c99d7f3476cd408ca8b702964d31898cf9a4234be95fe306af1dea07bc51208", "problem": "disc:pi-bronze", "winner": "263738c8259bc4148e6f6816368a395fe17891165db7892347d95082bf955461"}}
